/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/test-mtmd-c-api.dir/test-mtmd-c-api.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test-mtmd-c-api.dir/get-model.cpp.o" -o ../bin/test-mtmd-c-api  -Wl,-rpath,/home/newubuntu/llama.cpp/build_fpga2/bin: ../common/libcommon.a ../bin/libmtmd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so ../bin/libllama.so ../bin/libggml.so ../bin/libggml-cpu.so ../bin/libggml-base.so
